source_file: Altumint-TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions-240326-194800.pdf

text_blocks.text: Load the WAGO DIN rail carriers which will function as distribution blocks. Install two (2) 5position WAGOs (PN 221-415) into one carrier (PN 221-501) and a single (1) 5-position WAGO into the second carrier. The WAGOs should audibly snap into the DIN carrier.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Snap the WAGO distribution blocks onto the left side of the DIN rail. Mark the block with two WAGOs as '+' and the other as '-' using a permanent marker.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Install QTY eight (8) 2' x 4-40 hex standoffs for web relay and modem mezzanine plate.
text_blocks.label: list_item

full_text: Load the WAGO DIN rail carriers which will function as distribution blocks. Install two (2) 5position WAGOs (PN 221-415) into one carrier (PN 221-501) and a single (1) 5-position WAGO into the second carrier. The WAGOs should audibly snap into the DIN carrier. Snap the WAGO distribution blocks onto the left side of the DIN rail. Mark the block with two WAGOs as '+' and the other as '-' using a permanent marker. Install QTY eight (8) 2' x 4-40 hex standoffs for web relay and modem mezzanine plate.
